title: Accessibility Simulation Data
agent_sampling: Visual agents are proportionally sampled from OD flow weights; they are not one agent per person.
path_geometry_policy: Walking access/egress uses the local OSM walk network where routing succeeds. Mikrotrans/backbone ride phases are represented by stop-to-stop vehicle footprints until exact r5py or GTFS-shape onboard path geometries are available.
planned_transit_policy: Existing-network simulation excludes planned transit layers.

input_mapping.destinations: Project AHP pipeline/dest_clean/*.gpkg plus weights in pipeline/config.yaml
input_mapping.accessibility_scores: Project AHP acc_mk_60 and delta fields by RW origin
input_mapping.r5py_paths: missing in current output set; replace fallback by exporting selected OD path geometries

limitations: Mikrotrans/backbone ride phases are represented by stop-to-stop vehicle footprints; exact onboard path geometries are still unavailable.
